title: Scientific Diff Pack (v0.1)
description: v0.193: an aggregator object that bundles N proposals into one reviewable change-set. The per-proposal carina.diff.v0.3 schema stays for atomic event diffs; vsd_* sits one level up and is what a reviewer actually reads. Content-addressed over the (frontier_id, ordered proposals, aggregate_kind, summary, created_at) tuple; pinned by Lean Theorem 23 (Scientific Diff Pack id injectivity).

pack_id.description: Content-addressed pack id derived from canonical bytes over the (frontier_id, ordered proposals, aggregate_kind, summary, created_at) tuple.

summary.description: Reviewer-readable summary of what this pack changes. <=280 chars (tweet-length discipline).

proposals.description: Ordered list of vpr_* proposal ids the pack bundles. Order matters — pack id is content-addressed over this list, and apply replays them in canonical order.

aggregate_kind.description: Plain-language category of the aggregate change. Free-form but conventionally one of: finding.cluster_revision, evidence.refresh, correction.batch, trajectory.continuation, replication.outcome, agent.proposal_set.

agent_run.description: Optional reference to a v0.195 agent attestation envelope. When present, declares the pack was produced by an LLM agent under a signed attestation.

parent_pack.description: Optional reference to a prior pack this one amends. Forms a chain of amendments without rewriting history.

applied_event_id.description: Optional. Set after `vela diff-pack apply` writes the pack id into each member's applied_event metadata.

signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature over the canonical preimage. Validates the pack was authorized by the declared signer.

signer_pubkey_hex.description: Optional Ed25519 public key the signature was produced under.
